full_implementation:
func NewMultiHasher() *MultiHasher {
	md5 := md5.New()
	sha1 := sha1.New()
	sha256 := sha256.New()
	sha512 := sha512.New()

	combinedWriter := io.MultiWriter(md5, sha1, sha256, sha512)

	return &MultiHasher{
		md5,
		sha1,
		sha256,
		sha512,
		combinedWriter,
	}
}

full_implementation:
func NewMultiHasher() *MultiHasher {
	md5 := md5.New()
	sha1 := sha1.New()
	sha256 := sha256.New()
	sha512 := sha512.New()

	combinedWriter := io.MultiWriter(md5, sha1, sha256, sha512)

	return &MultiHasher{
		md5,
		sha1,
		sha256,
		sha512,
		combinedWriter,
	}
}
